primary.name: MVTec AD 2
primary.why: New advanced scenarios; old MVTec AD and VisA are saturated.

primary.name: Real-IAD
primary.why: Large-scale real industrial data with multi-view properties.

primary.name: MMAD or MMR-AD
primary.why: Evaluates industrial anomaly understanding and multimodal reasoning.

primary.name: M3-AD
primary.why: Tests reflection/self-correction and multimodal anomaly reasoning.

auxiliary.name: MVTec AD
auxiliary.why: Classic benchmark; use to show no regression, not as main novelty.

auxiliary.name: MVTec LOCO AD
auxiliary.why: Use when evaluating logical or structural anomalies.

ablations: Backbone swap: CLIP vs SigLIP vs DINOv2 vs AnomalyVFM
